_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: In contrast to the NF1-deficient glioma lines, and despite successful ATRX knockdown, ATRX loss had no effect on growth in vitro (NF90-8, ST88-14, and JHH-CRC65)
details: ATRX loss had no effect on growth in vitro despite successful ATRX knockdown
